sections.paragraph:
ἀσυγκρασία, ας, ἡ (α-priv. + σύγκρασις ‘commixture’; not found elsewh.) lack of sharing/community spirit Hv 3, 9, 4.—DELG s.v. κεράννυμι.

priv. priv. = privativum (in grammar: privative, w. negating force)

Hv Hv = Visions

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 146
